parameters.content:
## 🔍 Competitor Video Analyzer → Email Report

**What it does:**
User pastes a competitor's YouTube URL in chat. WayinVideo AI generates a full summary with key highlights & tags. The workflow builds a styled HTML report and emails it automatically.

**How it works:**
1. 💬 User sends a competitor video URL via chat
2. 🎬 Video is submitted to WayinVideo for AI summarization
3. ⏳ Waits 30s, then polls until summary is ready
4. 🔄 If not ready → waits 30s again (auto-retry loop)
5. 📧 Builds a styled HTML email with title, summary, highlights & hashtags
6. 📨 Sends the report to your email via Gmail

---

**🔑 Credentials to Add:**
- Gmail → Connect OAuth2 credential

**🔧 Placeholders to Fill:**

`YOUR_WAYINVIDEO_API_KEY`
→ Your WayinVideo API Bearer token
  Get it from: wayinvideo.com/dashboard/api
  (used in both Submit & Poll nodes)

`YOUR_REPORT_EMAIL@domain.com`
→ Email address where the analysis report will be sent
  (in the Send Gmail node)

---

**⚙️ Customise (in Submit node):**
- `target_lang` → Change summary language
  e.g. "en", "hi", "es", "fr"

**⚙️ Customise (in Build Email node):**
- Edit HTML template to match your brand colors
- Add/remove sections like hashtags or highlights

---

**⚠️ Note:**
Long videos may take >30s to process.
The workflow auto-retries every 30s until the summary is ready.

## 🎬 Submit Video for AI Analysis

• Takes video URL from user input
• Sends it to WayinVideo API
• Starts AI summary generation

👉 This is where analysis begins

## ⏳ Wait & Fetch Results

• Waits 30 seconds for processing
• Checks API for summary results
• Uses job ID to track progress

👉 Gives time for AI to process video

## 🔁 Check if Summary is Ready

• Verifies if status = SUCCEEDED
• If NOT ready → waits again (loop)
• If ready → moves forward

👉 Smart retry system until result is ready

## 📧 Build Email Report

• Extracts title, summary, tags
• Creates styled HTML email
• Adds highlights with timestamps

👉 Converts data into readable report

## 📨 Send Email Report

• Sends report via Gmail
• Uses subject & HTML content
• Delivers final analysis to inbox

👉 Final output to user

parameters.initialMessages:
Hi! Send me a competitor YouTube video URL and I will summarize it and email you the key insights.

Example: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=XXXXXXXXX
